creator: dima@best.net
text:
I believe, I've never seen this problem before.
	Here goes back trace from gdb on crash dump:

	current pcb at 1ee93c
	panic: pmap_dispose_proc: upage already missing???
	(kgdb) bt
	#0  boot (howto=0x104) at ../../kern/kern_shutdown.c:266
